# elorm/ui

> Copy-paste React component library with Base UI or Radix UI, Tailwind CSS v4, OKLCH theming, and installable agent skills.

## Site

- Home: https://ui.elorm.xyz
- Docs: https://ui.elorm.xyz/docs
- Installation: https://ui.elorm.xyz/docs/get-started/installation
- CLI reference: https://ui.elorm.xyz/docs/get-started/cli
- Agent skills: https://ui.elorm.xyz/docs/get-started/agent-skills
- Alternatives: https://ui.elorm.xyz/docs/get-started/alternatives
- Components: https://ui.elorm.xyz/docs/components/button

## Install CLI

npx elorm init
npx elorm add button card dialog

## Install agent skill

npx skills add Akarikev/ui --skill elorm -g -y

## Registry

https://ui.elorm.xyz/r/registry.json

## Source

- GitHub: https://github.com/Akarikev/ui
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/elorm
